business.headline: Crude oil above $100 again: Will petrol, diesel get costlier soon?Global crude oil prices climbed above $100 per barrel on Thursday, raising a question millions of Indian consumers care about most. Will this lead to costlier petrol and diesel prices?

Rupee slides to 94 against US dollar: Is crude oil the biggest risk right now?The rupee has already fallen nearly 1% this week and has slipped well past its recent highs of around 92.50. That earlier rise was largely supported by measures taken by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) in late March and April.

Dr Reddy's jumps nearly 7% as Sensex falls: Why is the pharma stock rising?Shares of Dr Reddy's Laboratories surged sharply on Thursday, bucking a weak broader market and emerging as one of the top gainers on the Nifty 50.

Sensex tumbles 650 points: Why is the stock market falling?Stock markets remained sharply lower in early trade on Thursday as crude oil above $100, global uncertainty and broad-based selling in financial and IT stocks weighed on sentiment.
Sensex, Nifty sink as crude oil prices reach $100; IndiGo down 2%The S&P BSE Sensex was down by 625.09 points to 77,891.40, while the NSE Nifty50 lost 173.90 points to 24,204.20 as of 9:26 am.

Stock market today: Will rising crude and Iran tensions drag Sensex, Nifty down?Early indicators suggest a weak start. GIFT Nifty futures were trading at 24,138 as of 8:30 am, pointing to a gap-down opening for the Nifty 50, which had closed at 24,378.1 in the previous session.

Brent crude crosses $100 as Iran tensions rise, peace talks stallOil prices have now risen for a fourth straight session, supported by larger-than-expected draws in US gasoline and distillate inventories, indicating robust demand.

Gold at Rs 1.52 lakh, silver near Rs 2.47 lakh: Should you stay invested or sell?Gold and silver prices are moving sharply, and many investors are wondering what to do next. With gold around Rs 1.52 lakh and silver near Rs 2.47 lakh, is it time to stay invested or consider selling?
Govt allows ethanol blending in Aviation Turbine FuelThe move is aimed at promoting Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) and reducing India's dependence on imported oil.
Why more roads won't fix Gurugram's traffic crisisGurugram's population has doubled from 1.5 million in 2011 to over 3 million today. Only 12 to 15% of residents regularly use public transport.
Sensex ends 757 points lower, Nifty below 24,400; HCLTech sinks 11%The S&P BSE Sensex tanked 756.84 points to close at 78,516.49, while the NSE Nifty50 lost 198.50 points to end at 24,378.10.

Lufthansa cuts 20,000 flights to save fuel costs as prices surgeJet fuel is one of the largest cost components for airlines, and a surge in prices has made several short-haul routes unviable. To manage this, Lufthansa is pulling back from unprofitable routes.

Do you need to file ITR if you over 80? Here's what you should knowTurning 80 comes with a few tax relaxations, but does it mean you can skip filing your ITR altogether? The rules are not that simple. Here's what you should know before assuming you are exempt.

Petrol, diesel prices unchanged in India. Will they rise soon?The West Asia war has triggered a major global crude oil supply shock, but India's petrol and diesel rates have remained unchanged since May 2022. We spoke to experts to understand how much longer India can keep fuel prices steady.

Selling your old car? Here's how to transfer no claim bonus before it is goneOne important thing to understand is that your No Claim Bonus belongs to you and not your car. When you sell your vehicle, the NCB does not get transferred to the new owner.

Can a car lease still help you save tax under the new regime?The new tax regime is often seen as simpler but with fewer perks. Yet, some benefits continue quietly in the background. One of them is car leasing. Could this be an easy way to save tax? Let's have a look.

8th Pay Commission meetings begin soon: What should you expect?With the 8th Pay Commission meetings set to begin soon, government employees are watching closely for updates on salaries and pensions. Will these discussions bring any big changes to your pay package?

RBI changes auto-debit rules: Your Netflix, SIPs and bill payments may get easierThe RBI has raised the no-OTP auto-debit limit to Rs 15,000, making recurring payments like subscriptions, SIPs, insurance premiums and bills smoother, faster and less prone to failure.

NSE nears IPO after Sebi panel clears Rs 1,800 crore settlementThe Securities and Exchange Board of India (Sebi) expert panel has approved NSE's proposal to settle long-pending cases by paying around Rs 1,800 crore.

Sensex tumbles 800 points: 4 things investors must knowAt around 9:50 am, the BSE Sensex was down 628.98 points, or 0.79%, at 78,644.35, while the NSE Nifty50 slipped 162.80 points, or 0.66%, to 24,413.80.

entertainment.headline: Samay Raina's Still Alive becomes the most-watched comedy special in the world Samay Raina's comeback special Still Alive has become the most-watched full-length stand-up comedy special on YouTube after the India's Got Latent controversy. The special had 53.5 million views on April 22.

Clayface teaser trailer: DC's eerie new villain takes shape in dark body horror DC Studios has unveiled the trailer for Clayface, a gripping psychological body horror film that explores the origin story of Batman's lesser-known villain. Featuring Tom Rhys Harries and Naomi Ackie, the movie promises a chilling narrative set for release in October.

Dhurandhar 2 box office Day 35: Rs 46 crore short of Baahubali 2's 9-year-old record Dhurandhar 2 continues its historic box office run, eyeing Baahubali 2: The Conclusion's long-standing global record. With just Rs 46 crore left to bridge the gap, can Dhurandhar: The Revenge pull off one of Indian cinema's biggest coups?

Russell Brand reacts to Katy Perry dating Justin Trudeau: KP, you took it too far Russell Brand joked about ex-wife Katy Perry's reported relationship with Justin Trudeau, saying she "took it too far." He also reflected on their failed marriage, admitting that his insecurities and obsession with fame contributed to their divorce.

Rajinikanth's early morning stroll trends as he casts his vote on polling day Superstar Rajinikanth's morning walk in Chennai went viral on polling day, drawing attention online. He later cast his vote at Stella Maris College in Chennai, along with his daughter Soundarya Rajinikanth.

Ajith braves chaotic crowd to caste vote in Tamil Nadu elections. Viral videos Tamil star and racer Ajith Kumar was among the first voters in Chennai's Thiruvanmiyur booth during the Tamil Nadu Assembly Elections. He returned recently from Belgium after finishing second in a 24-hour endurance race.

Won at Cannes, now leads jury: India's Payal Kapadia takes over Critics' Week A year after All We Imagine As Light made history at Cannes, Payal Kapadia has landed another major honour at the festival. She will now head the jury at the 65th Cannes Critics' Week, which spotlights emerging talent from across the world.

Hansika Motwani's take on casting couch reeks of victim-shaming, ignorance Hansika Motwani's comment on casting couch unintentionally hints at victim-blaming by suggesting serious workers avoid such exploitation, which oversimplifies a complex issue. This highlights how casual remarks by public figures can perpetuate harmful myths, underscoring the need for more responsible conversations in India.

Aryan Khan gets into hilarious joota churai battle at best friend's wedding. Watch Aryan Khan was seen participating in the joota churai ceremony at his best friend's wedding. He almost fell while running away with the groom's shoe and his fun moments later went viral.

Vivek Agnihotri remembers Pahalgam tragedy: No belief can ever justify lives lost Vivek Agnihotri marked one year of the Pahalgam tragedy with an emotional note remembering the victims and reflecting on the devastating impact of terrorism. The filmmaker's next release, Operation Sindoor, is based on the tragedy.

Deepika Padukone's Raaka role crucial, say makers dismissing 'baseless' rumours Amid rumours of a replacement or the role being cut short, the makers of Raaka have issued a clarification regarding actor Deepika Padukone's role. They confirmed she plays a crucial part in the film.

Haryanvi actor Divyanka Sirohi dies at 30 after sudden illness at Ghaziabad home Haryanvi actor Divyanka Sirohi, known for her work in over 50 music videos, died suddenly at her Ghaziabad home. Her family said she felt unwell before collapsing. The exact cause of death is yet to be confirmed.

Deven Bhojani recalls whistling, cheering for Ranveer while watching Dhurandhar Actor Deven Bhojani recalled his experience of watching Dhurandhar and said he felt like a frontbencher cheering and whistling throughout the film. He also praised Ranveer Singh's performance, calling it brilliant and deeply engaging.

Rajpal Yadav opens up on love story with wife Radha, recalls family reaction Actor Rajpal Yadav got candid about his love story with wife Radha and shared how they met in Canada. He also recalled his father-in-law's first impression and shared how Radha's honesty shapes his life and work.

David Dhawan on his advice to Varun over Border 2 trolling: This will get over David Dhawan opened up on how Varun Dhawan dealt with the trolling he faced during Border 2. He also recalled his advice to Varun over the social media negativity.
Kartikeya director teams up with Akshay Kumar, Rana Daggubati for next: Report Director Chandoo Mondeti is set to collaborate with Akshay Kumar and Rana Daggubati for a historical thriller.

Michael first reviews: Jaafar Jackson shines as King of Pop but biopic lacks depth The first reviews of the musical biopic Michael have praised Jaafar Jackson as the King of Pop, Michael Jackson. The film is set for a theatrical release on April 24.

Raja Shivaji: Riteish Deshmukh defends Wagh Nakh scene, says watch the film Actor Riteish Deshmukh responded to criticism over a scene in Raja Shivaji's trailer after users questioned its historical accuracy. He urged audiences to watch the film on May 1 before forming an opinion.

Abhishek Bachchan calls Aishwarya Rai his soulmate, recalls love story Days after their 19th wedding anniversary, Abhishek Bachchan opened up about his love story with Aishwarya Rai Bachchan. He called her his soulmate and recalled how the couple fell in love.

general news.headline: After killing IRS officer's daughter, ex-help tried using her finger to unlock safeDuring interrogation, the accused revealed that he dragged the unconscious victim from a rooftop study room down the stairs to a lower floor in an attempt to use her fingerprints to access a safe.

Trump's 'hellhole' mention for India, China as he targets birthright citizenshipDonald Trump posted a controversial letter on Truth Social calling India, China and other nations "hellholes" while attacking birthright citizenship and alleging immigrants exploit US systems.

TMC, BJP face off in Bengal phase 1 polls; three-way battle in Tamil Nadu  Live UpdatesPolling is underway across 152 of West Bengal's 294 constituencies in the first phase, while all 234 seats in Tamil Nadu are voting in a single-day contest. Both states are expected to see pitched poll battles that could reshape regional power equations.

Triangular turn in Tamil Nadu: Vijay disrupts decades-old DMK vs AIADMK contestAs Tamil Nadu votes today, the polls mark a historic shift from a long-standing DMK–AIADMK bipolar contest to an unpredictable triangular battle, with Vijay's TVK rewriting the electoral equations.

I am a doctor for diabetes, BP, cholesterol and this is my must-do morning routineA healthy lifestyle adopted today is like a long-term investment, writes Dr Chandrakant Lahariya in this edition of DocYard. He adds, it pays dividends in the form of vitality, independence, and quality of life as you age.

Live: TMC-BJP workers clash at polling booth in Siliguri, central forces step inAssembly Election Live Updates: Voting for the first phase of elections in West Bengal and all of 234 seats of Tamil Nadu started this morning after weeks of intense campaigning. In Bengal, 152 seats are in the fray in the first phase, with high turnout expected among nearly 3.6 crore voters. The remaining seats will vote on April 29. In Tamil Nadu, the race is triangular, featuring the DMK under MK Stalin, AIADMK led by Edappadi K Palaniswami, and actor-turned-politician Vijay's TVK. As the voting picked up, Stalin cast his vote in Chennai, while Rajinikanth and TVK chief Vijay also exercised their franchise. In West Bengal, LoP Suvendu Adhikari cast his ballot. The BJP also filed a complaint against CM Mamata Banerjee, accusing her of Model Code violations and inflammatory remarks. Meanwhile, Prime Minister Narendra Modi encouraged voters in both states to participate enthusiastically, calling elections a "festival of democracy" and urging youth and women to ensure record turnout. Stay tuned to indiatoday.in for the latest updates.

CCTV, auto ride, 15 teams: How Delhi cops tracked killer of IRS officer's daughterDelhi Police tracked the accused, Rahul Meena, using CCTV footage, tracing his route and identifying an auto-rickshaw he boarded after the crime. The driver led them to a hotel, where he was arrested.

Dr Reddy's jumps nearly 7% as Sensex falls: Why is the pharma stock rising?Shares of Dr Reddy's Laboratories surged sharply on Thursday, bucking a weak broader market and emerging as one of the top gainers on the Nifty 50.

Rapido driver receives dog to deliver as 'parcel', watch for instant serotonin boostA Rapido driver found himself delivering the "cutest parcel ever" which turned out to be an adorable dog, leaving the internet completely smitten.

Stared at my chest, asked me to visit cleric after miscarriage: TCS Nashik team leadA TCS Nashik team lead, who has been working with the organisation for past 11 years, alleged that she personally knew several of the accused and was subjected to inappropriate gestures, staring and comments by the group, including inappropriate suggestions by Tausif after her miscarriage.

Crude oil above $100 again: Will petrol, diesel get costlier soon?Global crude oil prices climbed above $100 per barrel on Thursday, raising a question millions of Indian consumers care about most. Will this lead to costlier petrol and diesel prices?

Trump creates 'naughty or nice' list for allies over their role in Iran warThe proposed "naughty and nice" list signals Donald Trump's intent to act against allies who defy his stance on the Iran war. It adds fresh strain to an already fraying alliance, which has faced repeated pressure from his policies, including territorial ambitions and threats of withdrawal from the pact.

Alone in darkness: This is how Earth will look when we travel to the MoonAt that distance, far beyond the altitude of the International Space Station, the planet appears as a luminous marble, its atmosphere glowing faintly against the void.

Trump says 'good news' on US-Iran talks soon; Tehran says no decision yetFresh US-Iran talks may restart within days, Donald Trump says, as the ceasefire continues. Tehran hasn't confirmed its participation in any upcoming talks.

Cartoons first, bowlers next: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi reveals his IPL routine at 15IPL 2026: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi continues to grab attention with his performances and personality in IPL 2026. The 15-year-old's revelation about watching cartoons before matches adds a unique layer to his growing story.

US Navy Secretary fired weeks after Army chief in sweeping shake-up amid Iran warUS Navy Secretary John Phelan has been fired amid tensions with Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth, slow shipbuilding reforms, and an ethics probe, during US-Iran war.

Ajith, Vijay, Rajinikanth, Kamal Haasan and celebs vote across Tamil NaduAjith Kumar, Kamal Haasan, Vijay, Rajinikanth, Shruti Haasan, Vijay, Anirudh Ravichander and several other celebrities cast their votes at their respective booths in the Tamil Nadu Assembly Elections.

Live: Mine clearance from Strait of Hormuz could stretch to 6 months, says PentagonUS-Iran War Live Updates: Senior Iranian officials have accused Washington of stalling peace negotiations, citing a US naval blockade of Iranian ports as a key obstacle, while Iran's Revolutionary Guard said it seized two foreign vessels in the Strait of Hormuz and fired on a third for alleged maritime violations. President Masoud Pezeshkian said Tehran remains open to "dialogue and agreement" but that breaches of commitments, blockades and threats are hindering meaningful talks. US President Donald Trump has signalled he remains prepared to resume military action if negotiations fail. Meanwhile, Lebanon condemned Israel over the killing of journalist Amal Khalil and the wounding of her colleague Zeinab Faraj, accusing it of violating a ceasefire through continued strikes and demolitions. Catch all the live updates at indiatoday.in.

Ex-help raped Alwar woman 12 hours before raping and killing IRS officer's daughterA 23-year-old former house help allegedly carried out two rapes within 12 hours -- first in Rajasthan's Alwar and then in a Delhi apartment belonging to his former employer, the police said.

Thanks for being soft: Pant cuts a sorry figure after inexplicable loss vs RRRishabh Pant's Lucknow Super Giants had a game to forget against Rajasthan Royals on April 23. Playing at home, Pant's side failed to chase down 160 runs, handing a 40-run win to visitors Rajasthan.

Raja Shivaji: Riteish Deshmukh defends Wagh Nakh scene, says watch the filmActor Riteish Deshmukh responded to criticism over a scene in Raja Shivaji's trailer after users questioned its historical accuracy. He urged audiences to watch the film on May 1 before forming an opinion.

Meet Pakistan's first astronauts set to go to Chinese Space StationThe announcement marks the country's most ambitious move yet in space exploration and signals deepening cooperation with Beijing in advanced scientific domains.

3 US Presidents rejected Netanyahu's Iran war plan, Trump agreed: Ex-Secy of StateJohn Kerry said Barack Obama, George W Bush, and Joe Biden rejected Benjamin Netanyahu's Iran war plan, but Donald Trump later approved a version of it despite internal objections.

Indian tourists caught stealing hotel items in Bali, staff check luggageThe controversy gained traction after an X user, Tarun Gautam, shared a video criticising the Indian tourists and called the episode embarrassing. The clip appears to show Bali hotel staff inspecting luggage during checkout as the Indian tourists waited in the vicinity.

sports.headline: IPL's war against left-arm spin and what Ravindra Jadeja makes of it IPL 2026: The IPL's reliance on match-ups has reshaped how left-arm spinners are used, often at the cost of context. Ravindra Jadeja weighs in on the balance between data, conditions, and on-field judgement.

Cartoons first, bowlers next: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi reveals his IPL routine at 15 IPL 2026: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi continues to grab attention with his performances and personality in IPL 2026. The 15-year-old's revelation about watching cartoons before matches adds a unique layer to his growing story.

Rajasthan Royals' Nandre Burger fined for abusive send off to LSG's Rishabh Pant IPL 2026: Nandre Burger, pacer for Rajasthan Royals, was fined for breaching the Indian Premier League Code of Conduct after an abusive send-off to Rishabh Pant. He was also handed one demerit point for his behaviour.

Donald Trump envoy pushes FIFA to replace Iran with Italy at World Cup 2026 FIFA World Cup 2026 faces fresh controversy after a proposal to replace Iran with Italy from none other than USA President Donald Trump's envoy. While the suggestion has sparked debate, FIFA has not indicated any change to the current tournament lineup.

Lamine Yamal's World Cup 2026 hopes in doubt after FC Barcelona injury scare Lamine Yamal suffered an injury scare during Barcelona's La Liga clash, raising concerns ahead of a crucial phase. The young star now faces a race against time to recover before the FIFA World Cup 2026.

MI vs CSK: Will MS Dhoni spice up strange IPL El Clasico of fallen giants? IPL 2026, MI vs CSK: Mumbai Indians and Chennai Super Kings face off in IPL 2026's first El Clasico on Thursday, but this time the contest carries a different edge, with both five-time champions still searching for consistency. The spotlight, as ever, is on MS Dhoni, who is on the verge of a return after a calf strain, while Rohit Sharma is also pushing to come back from a hamstring injury.

IPL 2026 Play of the Day: How Rishabh Pant's stupid swipe sank Lucknow at home IPL 2026, LSG vs RR: Rishabh Pant lasted just three balls, but that brief stay set the tone for a muddled batting effort from Lucknow Super Giants. Chasing 160, they squandered the hard work of their fast bowlers and never truly looked in control against Rajasthan Royals.

Laura Wolvaardt's South Africa outclass India to take 3-0 series lead South Africa secured an unassailable 3-0 lead in the five-match T20I series with a commanding nine-wicket win over India in the third match at the Wanderers Stadium in Johannesburg on Wednesday.

BCCI is killing Indian players: Lalit Modi lashes out at board Former IPL boss, Lalit Modi has lashed out at the Indian Cricket Board, calling it heartless. Modi has said that BCCI treats its players like mules and is killing them with hectic scheduling.

Thanks for being soft: Pant cuts a sorry figure after inexplicable loss vs RR Rishabh Pant's Lucknow Super Giants had a game to forget against Rajasthan Royals on April 23. Playing at home, Pant's side failed to chase down 160 runs, handing a 40-run win to visitors Rajasthan.

Jadeja's POTM gesture explained: Why did he thank Gujarat's Education Minister? Ravindra Jadeja turned in a match-winning all-round performance for Rajasthan Royals in their IPL 2026 clash against Lucknow Super Giants at the Ekana Stadium on Wednesday, but it was his post-match gesture that truly grabbed attention.

IPL 2026: No one-man show as Jadeja and Archer leave LSG lost at homeIPL 2026, LSG vs RR: Lucknow Super Giants lost their seventh successive game at home, failing to chase a 160-run target at the Ekana Stadium on Wednesday. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi did not fire, but Rajasthan clicked as a unit to snap their two-match losing streak.

Chelsea sack manager Liam Rosenior after five straight Premier League defeatsChelsea FC have dismissed head coach Liam Rosenior after a tenure of less than four months, following a run of five consecutive defeats in the Premier League without scoring, a sequence not seen at the club since 1912.

Every ball Mayank Yadav bowled on his IPL returnMayank Yadav made his return to the Indian Premier League after a hiatus of 353 days. Back from a serious injury break, Mayank bowled his full quota of 4 overs on Wednesday. Here's how it went for the tearaway fast bowler.

Tilak Varma explains how Rohit Sharma's tip sparked his masterclass against GTIPL 2026, MI vs CSK: Tilak Varma revealed on Wednesday that Rohit Sharma's advice to play the first 15–20 balls without overthinking the situation helped him return to form with an IPL hundred.

LSG vs RR: Hundreds traveled for a glimpse, but no Sooryavanshi party in LucknowIPL 2026, LSG vs RR: The buzz around Vaibhav Sooryavanshi was unmistakable in Lucknow on Wednesday. Several fans travelled from afar to watch the 15-year-old in action, but he endured a rare off day, scoring just 8 against Lucknow Super Giants.

Puducherry cricket body suspends 3 players on charges of assault on U-19 state coachThe Cricket Association of Pondicherry (CAP) has suspended three of its first-class cricketers with immediate effect on allegations that they assaulted U-19 state team coach Venkataraman on December 8 last year.

LSG vs RR: After 353-day injury layoff, pacer Mayank Yadav makes IPL returnLucknow Super Giants received a timely boost as tearaway pacer Mayank Yadav returned to the playing XI after a 353-day injury layoff, with captain Rishabh Pant opting to bowl first against Rajasthan Royals at the Ekana Stadium on Tuesday.

MI vs CSK: MS Dhoni, Rohit Sharma face late fitness tests ahead of El ClasicoIPL 2026, MI vs CSK: MS Dhoni and Rohit Sharma are set to undergo late fitness tests after the two stalwarts batted in tandem during a nets session on Wednesday, ahead of the much-anticipated Mumbai Indians vs Chennai Super Kings clash.

LSG vs RR Highlights: Jofra Archer leads Rajasthan to epic comeback win at EkanaLucknow (LSG) vs Rajasthan (RR) Highlights, IPL 2026: LSG (119-all-out in 18 ovs), chasing 160. Rajasthan Royals stage an epic comeback at the Ekana Stadium in Lucknow. Defending just 159, with no luxury of an Impact Sub, the Rajasthan bowling attack bowled out the hosts for just 119 runs.

Real Madrid star Bellingham invests in cricket: Buys stake in Hundred franchiseJude Bellingham steps into cricket with a stake in Birmingham Phoenix. The Real Madrid star's investment reflects both his sporting interests and deep-rooted connection to Birmingham.

PAK star under investigation after testing positive for recreational drug useT20 World Cup 2026: Pakistan's Mohammad Nawaz faces a PCB probe after a reported positive drug test during the T20 World Cup, with his Surrey deal cancelled and his immediate cricketing future now uncertain.

Probably learnt nothing: Andy Murray reflects on coaching Novak DjokovicAndy Murray reflects on his coaching stint with Novak Djokovic, calling it insightful despite no major wins, while backing the Serbian to bounce back from injury and contend for another Grand Slam.

Rs 50 crore wasted? Pant, Pooran under pressure to justify price-tagIPL 2026: Lucknow Super Giants face mounting pressure as their most expensive duo, Rishabh Pant and Nicholas Pooran struggle for form. With a crucial clash against Rajasthan Royals next, the spotlight is firmly on experienced duo to deliver.

IPL 2026: If Pat Cummins returns, should SRH stick with Ishan Kishan as captain?IPL 2026: Pat Cummins' return leaves SRH with a big captaincy call, as Ishan Kishan's strong stint sparks debate over whether the franchise should stick with continuity or revert to experience.

IPL teams not getting it right vs left-handers? Orange Cap standings tell a storyIndian Premier League 2026 numbers highlight a clear trend in batting dominance. Left-handers are thriving at the top, while teams continue to struggle with tactics and trust issues in handling matchups against them.

Venus Williams targets return to French Open after five years despite lean patchVenus Williams eyes a French Open return despite a 10-match losing streak, as the veteran continues her clay comeback after a first-round exit at the Madrid Open.

What was Axar Patel thinking? DC captain slammed for tactical blunders vs SRHIPL 2026: Axar Patel faces heavy criticism after Delhi Capitals' tactical missteps vs SRH. Overusing a part-timer while underutilising key spinners proved costly as DC lost control in a high-scoring clash on Tuesday.

Was Kagiso Rabada smoking in Gujarat Titans team hotel? Viral video sparks buzzA video clip has gone viral on social media which allegedly shows Gujarat Titans' Kagiso Rabada smoking what looked to be a cigarette.

Premier League glory in 2016, Leicester City relegated to England's 3rd divisionLeicester City have been relegated to League One after a draw against Hull City. The 2016 Premier League champions complete a stunning fall, dropping to England's third tier after back-to-back relegations and a troubled campaign.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
